title: eutriana humilis
intro: Eutriana humilis, also known as the "pencil cedar" or "cedar pencil tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eutriana humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Eutriana humilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
